array_types.name: DONE_proc_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DONE_proc_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

array_types.name: DONE_sram_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DONE_sram_Field_Array is array (0 .. 5) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 6;

type FRCE_OFF_proc_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

array_types.name: FRCE_OFF_sram_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type FRCE_OFF_sram_Field_Array is array (0 .. 5) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 6;

array_types.name: FRCE_ON_proc_Field_Array

type FRCE_ON_proc_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

array_types.name: FRCE_ON_sram_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type FRCE_ON_sram_Field_Array is array (0 .. 5) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 6;

array_types.name: WDSEL_proc_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type WDSEL_proc_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

array_types.name: WDSEL_sram_Field_Array

record_types.name: DONE_proc_Field
DONE_Register
DONE_sram_Field
FRCE_OFF_proc_Field
FRCE_OFF_Register
FRCE_OFF_sram_Field
FRCE_ON_proc_Field
FRCE_ON_Register
FRCE_ON_sram_Field
PSM_Peripheral

fields.name: FRCE_ON
fields.description: Force into reset (i.e. power it off)

fields.name: FRCE_OFF
fields.description: Set to 1 if this peripheral should be reset when the watchdog fires.

fields.name: WDSEL
fields.description: Indicates the peripheral's registers are ready to access.

record_types.name: WDSEL_proc_Field
WDSEL_Register
WDSEL_sram_Field

variables.name: PSM_Periph
variables.code:
PSM_Periph : aliased PSM_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => PSM_Base;
